title: RBI's Responsible Business Conduct (Second Amendment) Directions - Effective July 1, 2026
description: <cite index="11-1,11-2">The RBI's Responsible Business Conduct (Second Amendment) Directions came into effect on July 1, 2026, strengthening borrower protections further, especially around agent conduct and escalation rules.</cite> <cite index="11-30,11-31">The July 2026 updates added sharper restrictions on prohibited recovery practices, including prohibitions on escalating to recovery agents while complaints are pending, contacting borrowers on Sundays or public holidays, harassment through apps and threatening messages, and asset seizure for unsecured loans without court orders.</cite>
